title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at Yes Bank - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Yes Bank! We are hiring a Risk Analyst for our Noida team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Yes Bank:
Yes Bank is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Due Diligence

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Yes Bank!
